creator: michelle@shellsshots.biz
text:
For information, I've moved the tarball to
http://flashback.sorbs.net/packages/pgpool-II-33-port-nostage.tar.gz and
added a new tarball in the originals place (
http://flashback.sorbs.net/packages/pgpool-II-33-port.tar.gz ), the
naming should give the difference away.. 

If I have got it right (seems to work in my build servers and puppet
installs and configures it correctly) it will remove 'NO_STAGE' (which
appears in all other pgpool-II ports and where I copied most of my
initial version from.)

-- 
Michelle Sullivan
http://www.mhix.org/
